raw_response:
BOTTLENECK: latency-bound
REASONING: This kernel performs no actual GPU computation—it only calls `cudaDeviceSynchronize()` and `std::puts()`, meaning the entire execution time is dominated by host-side API call latency and the overhead of launching/synchronizing with the CUDA runtime. There are no compute, memory, or occupancy characteristics to analyze because no GPU work is dispatched. The bottleneck is purely the fixed latency of the CUDA runtime calls and host-side serial execution.

There are no compute, memory, or occupancy characteristics to analyze because no GPU work is dispatched. The bottleneck is purely the fixed latency of the CUDA runtime calls and host-side serial execution.
